signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2% YoY, Beating Prior Months but Missing 2.4% Forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][3]

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, per Trading Economics, while rateinflation.com reports a slightly lower 2.16%; both confirm the uptick fell short of market expectations around 2.4%.[1][3] This dat
